en: A SONG OF ASCENTS.Remember, O LORD, in David's favor, all the hardships he endured,
zh: 耶和華啊！求你記念大衛， 記念他的一切苦難。

en: how he swore to the LORD and vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob,
zh: 他怎樣向耶和華起誓， 向雅各的大能者許願，說：

en: "I will not enter my house or get into my bed,
zh: “我必不進我的家 ， 也必不上我的床榻。

en: I will not give sleep to my eyes or slumber to my eyelids,
zh: 我必不容我的眼睛睡覺， 也不容我的眼瞼打盹；

en: until I find a place for the LORD, a dwelling place for the Mighty One of Jacob."
zh: 直到我為耶和華找著一個地方， 為雅各的大能者找到居所。”

en: Behold, we heard of it in Ephrathah; we found it in the fields of Jaar.
zh: 我們聽說約櫃在以法他； 我們在雅珥的田間找到它。

en: "Let us go to his dwelling place; let us worship at his footstool!"
zh: “我們要進入他的居所， 在他的腳凳前下拜。

en: Arise, O LORD, and go to your resting place, you and the ark of your might.
zh: 耶和華啊，求你起來， 求你和你有能力的約櫃同入安息的居所。

en: Let your priests be clothed with righteousness, and let your saints shout for joy.
zh: 願你的祭司都披上公義， 願你的聖民都歡呼。

en: For the sake of your servant David, do not turn away the face of your anointed one.
zh: 求你因你僕人大衛的緣故， 不要轉臉不理你的受膏者。”

en: The LORD swore to David a sure oath from which he will not turn back: "One of the sons of your body I will set on your throne.
zh: 耶和華實實在在向大衛起了誓， 他必不會收回，他說： “我要從你的後裔中， 立一位坐在你的王位上。

en: If your sons keep my covenant and my testimonies that I shall teach them, their sons also forever shall sit on your throne."
zh: 如果你的子孫謹守我的約， 和我教訓他們的法度， 他們的子孫也必永遠坐在你的王位上。”

en: For the LORD has chosen Zion; he has desired it for his dwelling place:
zh: 因為耶和華揀選了錫安， 定意把它當作自己的居所。他說：

en: "This is my resting place forever; here I will dwell, for I have desired it.
zh: “這是我永遠安息的居所； 我要住在這裡，因為我定意這樣作。

en: I will abundantly bless her provisions; I will satisfy her poor with bread.
zh: 我要賜給錫安豐盛的糧食， 我要使城中的窮人飽足。

en: Her priests I will clothe with salvation, and her saints will shout for joy.
zh: 我要使祭司都披上救恩， 使聖民都大大歡呼。

en: There I will make a horn to sprout for David; I have prepared a lamp for my anointed.
zh: 我要在那裡使大衛的角長起來， 我要為我的受膏者安排明燈。

en: His enemies I will clothe with shame, but on him his crown will shine."
zh: 我要使他的仇敵都披上羞辱， 但他的冠冕必在他頭上發光。”
